quiz.question:
The king goes to f8 after the check. 

Does the sacrifice Nxf6 work?

feedback.text: You're correct. Black does not have an easy way to counter it. Rb2 fails due to many reasons.

distractors.text: No, Black has a strong Zwischenzug.

feedback.text: You'd think so, but if you analyze it with some more depth, Black's Zwischenzugs don't work.

distractors.text: No it doesn't, White’s knight won’t be stable on f6.

feedback.text: The queen can never take it because the rook hangs.
